title: stelis aurantiaca
intro: Stelis aurantiaca, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis aurantiaca include its potential to reduce pain, prevent infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Stelis aurantiaca can be found in tea, tincture, and powder forms, often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
